metadata.description: Travel planning and linter-driven development plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: travel-planner
plugins.description: Comprehensive travel planning assistant with alternative route discovery, forum-first reviews, multi-tier budgets (NIS-first pricing), and detailed comparison reports

plugins.name: go-linter-driven-development
plugins.description: Linter-driven development workflow for Go with 6 specialized skills: meta orchestrator, design, testing, refactoring, review, and documentation

plugins.name: ts-react-linter-driven-development
plugins.description: Linter-driven development workflow for TypeScript + React with 6 specialized skills: meta orchestrator, component design, testing, refactoring, review, and documentation
